vulnerabilities.name: Missing X-Content-Type-Options
vulnerabilities.description: Security header X-Content-Type-Options is not set

vulnerabilities.name: SQL Injection Risk
vulnerabilities.description: Potential SQL injection vulnerability detected. Attackers could extract database contents.
vulnerabilities.remediation: Use parameterized queries and input validation.

vulnerabilities.name: Cross-Site Scripting Risk
vulnerabilities.description: Reflected XSS vulnerability may allow script injection.
vulnerabilities.remediation: Implement output encoding and CSP headers.

vulnerabilities.name: Missing Security Headers
vulnerabilities.remediation: Add X-Frame-Options, CSP, and HSTS headers.

fixes.one_click_fix: Replace all SQL queries with prepared statements

fixes.fix_code:
# Apache .htaccess
Header set X-Frame-Options "DENY"
Header set X-Content-Type-Options "nosniff"
Header set X-XSS-Protection "1; mode=block"
fixes.one_click_fix: Add security headers to server config
Replace all SQL queries with prepared statements

fixes.fix_code:
# SECURE CODE - Output Encoding
echo htmlspecialchars($_GET['input'], ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');

# Apache .htaccess
Header set X-Frame-Options "DENY"
Header set X-Content-Type-Options "nosniff"
Header set X-XSS-Protection "1; mode=block"
fixes.one_click_fix: Add security headers to server config
